title: HTI 1373723 Fun Dough, Multicolor, 3 Pack
features: This glitter dough will provide hours of squidgy fun!
The pretty putty comes in fun colours
Is the perfect indoors entertainment for when we can’t go outside!
description: Product Description HTI Fun Dough Of 3 Pack Each pack of Fun Dough comes in 3 colours. Fun Dough is a great value play dough suitable for young children. Shape, and play in an interactive, creative way. It's low cost makes it great for pocket money buys. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes.
